keywords.job: I am a priest of Zathroth, the bringer of dark secrets.
keywords.name: My name is Lugri.
keywords.news: You will soon see the 'news' with your own eyes. <chuckle>
keywords.tibia: The world of Tibia is to be taken by the strongest.
keywords.how: I feel the power of evil rising and enjoy that.
keywords.are: I feel the power of evil rising and enjoy that.
keywords.you: I feel the power of evil rising and enjoy that.
keywords.sell: I am in the death business. You wouldn't like what I have to offer.
keywords.god$: The gods of darkness give us the chance to reach our whole potentials, the gods of good want to capture us in eternal stasis!
keywords.gods$: The gods of darkness give us the chance to reach our whole potentials, the gods of good want to capture us in eternal stasis!
keywords.life: Life is war. It's about survival of the fittest.
keywords.citizen: The people of Tibia are sheep, so be smart and strong enough to become their wolf.
keywords.people: The people of Tibia are sheep, so be smart and strong enough to become their wolf.
keywords.king: This puny king is no threat for our master's plans.
keywords.monster: They are a challenge to sift the chaff from the wheat.
keywords.quest: Aren't we all on a quest for survival and supremacy?
keywords.mission: Aren't we all on a quest for survival and supremacy?
keywords.survival: Aren't we all on a quest for survival and supremacy?
keywords.supermacy: Aren't we all on a quest for survival and supremacy?
keywords.gold: Do you want to make a donation?
keywords.money: Do you want to make a donation?
keywords.donation: Do you want to make a donation?
keywords.slay: The weak have to be slain by the strong!
keywords.heal: Your wounds are your problem, not mine.
keywords.help: If you cant help yourself you are not worth of my assistance.
keywords.ferumbras: He is one of Zathroth's strongest followers and wields special powers, given to him by the dark one.
keywords.excalibug: It's existence is just a lie to inspire hope and bravery in the hearts of the followers of good.
keywords.fardos: Fardos is the creator. He is a helpless watcher whose 'creation' is far more then he bargained for.
keywords.uman: Uman is a jealous keeper of magic. He gives only little knowledge to the mortals.
keywords.suon: Suon is one of the suns of our world. He gives his light mindlessly to the weak and the strong alike.
keywords.crunor: Crunor is a plantgod ... and plants exist to be stomped over.
keywords.nornur: Nornur fancies himself as god of fate without even understanding the ways of fate at all.
keywords.bastesh: Bastesh is so afraid that she hides in the depth of the seas.
keywords.kirok: Kirok, the mad one, is the patron of scientists and jesters, more a nuisance than a god.
keywords.toth: Toth is just the undertaker for the other 'gods of good'.
keywords.banor: Banor isn't a god at all, but one of their tools. It is stupidity to worship a tool, isn't it?
keywords.tibiasula: Zathroth took her life, recoginzig it was necessary for the process of creation.
keywords.sula: Sula is just the mindless elemental power of water.
keywords.air: Air is is just a mindless elemental force.
keywords.fire: Fire is is just a mindless elemental force.
keywords.zathroth: Zathroth represents the true and unbound power of magic. He is the keeper of great secrets.
keywords.fafnar: Fafnar is the power of the sun. She burns the weak to ashes.
keywords.brog: Brog, the raging one, the great destroyer, the berserk of darkness ... call him how you like, but fear his awesome power.
keywords.urgith: Urgith is the master of the undead. The bonemaster also takes care of the damned souls.
keywords.archdemons: The demons are powerful followers of Zathroth. Their leaders are known as the ruthless seven.
keywords.ruthless: Infernatil, Pumin, Verminor, Tafariel, Apocalypse, Bazir and Ashfalor.
keywords.seven: Infernatil, Pumin, Verminor, Tafariel, Apocalypse, Bazir and Ashfalor.
keywords.tafariel: She is the mistress of the damned! Rewarding or torturing, it is the same for her victims!
keywords.apocalypse: It is said even speaking its TRUE name will bring total destruction to you!
keywords.pumin: He is the lord of despair.
keywords.bazir: He is the great deciver, the lord of lies.
keywords.ashfalor: The right hand of Urgith. The general of the undead hordes.
keywords.pits: That name is a disgrace. The pityful nightmare knights couldn't defend them and even lost the treasure of their order there.
keywords.inferno: After the ruthless seven conquered it, it's again a holy place for the followers of the dark path.
keywords.nightmare: That name is a disgrace. The pityful nightmare knights couldn't defend them and even lost the treasure of their order there.
keywords.goshnar: The necromant king was only defeated by the nightmare knights due to a bad twist of fate.

texts: I am a priest of Zathroth, the bringer of dark secrets.

entries.response: Don't be ashamed but you lack the gold.
The so called gods of good are Fardos, Uman, the elements, Suon, Crunor, Nornur, Bastesh, Kirok, Toth, and Banor.
The so called gods of good are Fardos, Uman, the elements, Suon, Crunor, Nornur, Bastesh, Kirok, Toth, and Banor.
Tibia is just the mindless elemental power of earth.
The glorious gods of darkness are Zathroth, Fafnar, Brog, Urgith, and the Archdemons.
The glorious gods of darkness are Zathroth, Fafnar, Brog, Urgith, and the Archdemons.
Fine. Now you get what you deserve, you fool! DIE IN AGONY!
